title: UAE announces petrol, diesel prices for May 2026 as fuel rates jump by up to 10% across Emirates
summary_full: UAE motorists will face higher fuel costs in May 2026 as petrol prices see another significant increase. This marks the third consecutive monthly hike, driven by global oil market instability and geopolitical tensions.  The latest revisions mean higher expenses for daily commutes and businesses reliant on transportation.
